name: return_mixpanel_analysis
description: Return the final Mixpanel analysis with a plain-text summary plus structured findings and recommendations. Call this exactly once when you have enough data to answer the user's question — this terminates the agent loop.

summary.description: Direct answer to the user's question. State the date window and any caveats. If the data was sparse or zero, say so plainly — do NOT invent trends.

findings.description: Concrete observations from the data — counts, percentages, top values. Each item is one bullet.

recommendations.description: Optional next-step ideas the user might want to act on. Leave empty if the question is purely descriptive.
